div.head: The Chargé in Denmark (Ives) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 25. Department’s 93, April 15, 6 p.m., to the Embassy, Paris [London], I am in receipt of a note, dated May 14th, signed by Minister of Foreign Affairs, wherein it is stated that Denmark, by the declaration made on April 16, last, by the Chairman of the International Relief Bond Committee, has renounced its liens upon the revenues of the Austrian Government derived from customs and tobacco monopoly, on the condition that the Hague agreement of January 20, 1930, come into force and that a similar renunciation is made by the United States.
